name: DA-Fusion: Deformable Attention-Based RGB-D Fusion Transformer for Unseen Object Instance Segmentation

description: arXiv:2607.17754v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In logistics automation, precise segmentation of unseen objects is crucial for efficient robotic manipulation in cluttered environments. Tasks such as bin-picking and shelf-picking require robust perception to handle occlusions, varying object shapes, and complex spatial arrangements. Traditional RGB-based methods tend to over-segment objects du...
author: Yesol Park, Hye-Jung Yoon, Juno Kim, Byoung-Tak Zhang
